caption: A man with a beard and short-cropped hair, wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, is seated in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which features the text "Rode Procaster" along its side. The background consists of black acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man’s facial expressions shift rapidly while he speaks. He begins with a slight, closed-mouth smile, transitions to a wide-eyed look of surprise with his mouth open, shifts his gaze and continues speaking with an open mouth, and finally settles into a thoughtful expression with his lips pursed. He remains stationary throughout the clip, with only his facial muscles and eyes moving as he interacts with someone or something off-screen.
